description: Relax in style and allow your feet to breathe freely in these casual slip-ons from carlton london. Made of pure leather, there's no better way to pamper your feet with style and comfort.Upper Single cap upper made of leather for maximum comfort, durability and style Midsole TPU midsole for durability and comfort Mildly cushioned, velvetty footbed with branding on heel for protection and style Outsole TPR outsole for enhanced durability and comfort shoe careWipe surface using a clean, dry cloth to remove dust
